subject: [PATCH v3 05/28] fsnotify: new tracepoint in fsnotify()

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new tracepoint to the fsnotify function, allowing developers to see exactly how this function is being called. The tracepoint captures various parameters passed to fsnotify and provides detailed information about each call. This addition will aid in debugging and understanding the behavior of fsnotify, which is used for file system notifications.
